Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc.And Rasier-Ca, Llc To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. and RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion Of Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc.And Rasier-Ca, Llc To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration.

Defendants' unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay the action pending completion of arbitration is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
